name: CairnCode
headline: Stone-neutral code color language
summary: A grounded, low-glare color philosophy for code interfaces and reading surfaces.
positioning: One stone-neutral palette philosophy translated across editors, documents, and web surfaces.

variantPhilosophy.dark: Mineral-weighted default for mixed-light daily work.
variantPhilosophy.darkSoft: Lower-stimulation night focus with quieter stone contrast.
variantPhilosophy.lightSoft: Gentle long-form light with calmer mineral warmth.
